seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: The email should include a bulleted list.
new_constraint: Refrain from including bulleted lists in the email.
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. The email should include a bulleted list. Refrain from including bulleted lists in the email.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Upcoming Exhibitions

Dear [Gallery Name] Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am a great admirer of your gallery and the innovative exhibitions you host. I am writing to inquire about your schedule of upcoming shows. I am particularly interested in learning more about what you have planned for the coming months so I can plan my visits accordingly.

Could you please provide me with some information regarding the following:

Details about any new artist features or solo exhibitions that will be opening soon.
Information on any themed group shows that are scheduled for the near future.
Details regarding any special events or openings associated with upcoming exhibitions.

If there is a dedicated section on your website or a digital program listing these events, I would be very grateful if you could direct me to it.

Thank you very much for your time and assistance. I look forward to hearing from you and hopefully visiting your gallery soon.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number or preferred contact info]<turn|>
